audit_items.proof_trace: The property holds. Access guard at L103-105 ensures only `s_auction` can call `auctionCallback`; sequential EVM execution guarantees `_multiCall(calls)` at L109 completes before `IERC20(assetOut).forceApprove(msg.sender, amountOut)` at L111, where `msg.sender == address(s_auction)` is invariant within the call frame. Reentrancy into `BaseAuction.bid()` during `_multiCall` is blocked by `s_entered` guard (BaseAuction.sol L415-418), and `forceApprove` at L111 overrides any intermediate approval manipulation performed by the multicall.
